inpi-radar-pi-espirito-santo-2026.title_pt: INPI mapeia PI no ES: 519 patentes, 68 mil marcas e 11 IGs [2026]
inpi-radar-pi-espirito-santo-2026.description_en: The INPI Technological Radar reveals the complete profile of industrial property use in Espírito Santo: who files, in which areas, and how the state positions itself in innovation.

migracao-proxmox-8-9-2026.title_en: How to migrate from Proxmox VE 8 to 9: step-by-step guide [2026]
migracao-proxmox-8-9-2026.title_pt: Como migrar do Proxmox VE 8 para o 9: guia passo a passo [2026]
migracao-proxmox-8-9-2026.description_en: Complete guide to migrating from Proxmox VE 8 (Debian 12-based) to Proxmox VE 9 (Debian 13 Trixie): repositories, kernel 6.14 upgrade, ZFS 2.3, common pitfalls and post-upgrade verification.

proxmox-backup-server-community-scripts-.title_en: Proxmox Backup Server: installation via community-scripts and backup configuration [2026]
proxmox-backup-server-community-scripts-.title_pt: Proxmox Backup Server: instalação via community-scripts e configuração de backups [2026]
proxmox-backup-server-community-scripts-.description_en: Complete guide to installing Proxmox Backup Server (PBS) using community-scripts in an LXC container, configuring datastore, integrating with Proxmox VE, and automating backups with scheduling and integrity verification.

inpi-eleicoes-2026-canais-comunicacao-gu.title_en: INPI in the 2026 Elections: Restricted Channels, Services Maintained — Complete Guide
inpi-eleicoes-2026-canais-comunicacao-gu.title_pt: INPI nas Eleições 2026: Canais Restritos, Serviços Mantidos — Guia Completo
inpi-eleicoes-2026-canais-comunicacao-gu.description_en: Starting July 4, INPI restricted its communication channels to comply with electoral legislation. Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn were deactivated until October 25. But essential services continue to operate. See what changes and how to continue following INPI.

gitbutler-terminal-cli-tui-2026.description_en: Exploring GitButler's new CLI and TUI — how 'but' is transforming Git workflow directly from the terminal, without leaving the editor. Comparison with the Desktop and command tips.

abpi-concurso-trabalhos-academicos-pi-20.title_en: ABPI Launches 1st Academic Paper Competition in IP: Submissions Open Until July 22 [2026]
abpi-concurso-trabalhos-academicos-pi-20.title_pt: ABPI Lança 1º Concurso de Trabalhos Acadêmicos em PI: Inscrições Abertas até 22 de Julho [2026]
abpi-concurso-trabalhos-academicos-pi-20.description_en: The Brazilian Intellectual Property Association (ABPI) opened submissions for its 1st Academic Papers and Abstracts Competition in IP, innovation, and technology. Deadline: July 22, 2026. Learn how to apply and what prizes are offered.
